name: Lit Decorative Easter Blow Mold Bunny Pink - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of charm to your Easter decor with the Lit Decorative Easter Blow Mold Bunny Pink - Spritz™. Crafted from durable plastic, this 11.81-inch decorative piece brings a playful vibe to any indoor setting. Lightweight and easy to place, it makes a charming addition to holiday displays. Perfect for adding seasonal flair to your home, this bunny sculpture delights with its adorable design and bright hue.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
